issue.title: Skeleton loaders for issue list, plan fetch, and detail panel (E66)

phases.title: Skeleton primitive + adopt in IssuesSection / IssueDetail plan area / IssueComments
verification: `apps/desktop/src/components/ui/Skeleton.tsx` exists and exports `Skeleton` (default render block), `Skeleton.Text` (configurable `lines`), and `Skeleton.Card` (fixed 52px height with two stacked text lines).

`apps/desktop/src/components/ui/Skeleton.css` exists; `.skeleton` block uses `--bg-tertiary`; the gradient + animation are nested inside `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)` so the shimmer is never painted under reduced-motion (not merely frozen).
`IssuesSection.tsx`: when `isLoading && issues.length === 0` renders 5 `<Skeleton.Card />` inside `.issues-section-list` (aria-busy="true"); the old text+spinner loading block is removed.

`IssueDetail.tsx`: gains a local `loadingPlan` boolean state; `useEffect` sets it true on plan fetch, clears it in both `.then` and `.catch`. The plan section renders 3 `<Skeleton height={28} />` rows when `loadingPlan && work !== null`, and the existing phase list when `!loadingPlan && plan && plan.phases.length > 0`.
`IssueComments.tsx`: `loading ? <Skeleton.Text lines={3} />` replaces the bare 'Loading comments...' text.
No layout shift on resolution — skeleton card heights match real card heights within ~6px; skeleton phase-row heights match the real phase row.
No store / IPC / Rust changes; no new dependencies.
`pnpm build` passes (tsc -b strict + vite); `pnpm test` is green (89 desktop tests preserved).
Manual smoke verified per the test plan: shimmer visible by default, suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.
phases.summary: Shipped a shared `<Skeleton>` primitive (flat block + `.Text` configurable-lines + `.Card` 52px composite, shimmer gated inside `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)`) in `apps/desktop/src/components/ui/Skeleton.{tsx,css}` and adopted it at three surfaces: IssuesSection initial-fetch (5 cards), IssueDetail plan area (3 phase rows via new `loadingPlan` state), IssueComments load (3-line Skeleton.Text). pnpm build (tsc -b + vite) clean; pnpm test green: shared 65/65, desktop 89/89, Rust 28/28.
